particulars.description: Various f/h properties including 2 bourne street, eastbourne and 89 langney road, eastbourne as are detailed in schedule 1 of the charge.

By way of legal mortgage all estates or interests in 2 bourne street eastbourne east sussex and all other multiple properties as detailed in the legal charge (ref. MD1491C) for more details please refer to the above legal charge.

11 bourne street eastbourne east sussex t/no EB23968 fixed charge all fixtures fittings plant and machinery which may from time to time be erected on or affixed to the property floating charge all other moveable plant machinery furniture equipment goods and other effects which are from time to time on the property.

secured_details.description: All monies due or to become due from the company to the chargee under the terms of the aforementioned instrument creating or evidencing the charge
